caption: A screen recording shows a web browser displaying a complex mind map or network diagram on a dark background. The diagram consists of various circular icons, including figures of people and symbols, connected by blue curved lines. Some nodes contain text such as "Insights -> introduction Runo," "Involved People," and "Invisible Things." A browser tab at the top reads "Trust & Learning by Systemeni" and another says "Future of Society by Systemeni." In the upper right corner of the screen, a small video inset shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt, appearing to be in a call or presentation. As the video progresses, the man's video feed vanishes and reappears, and a vertical sidebar on the right flickers, showing a name that reads "Santi Rodriguez." The main network diagram remains static throughout the sequence.
